title: Toilet Flush Handle Eeplacement Kit Zinc Alloy Metal Toilet Handle Replacement, Toilet Cistern Lever Arm with Chain - Adjustable Arm
features: 【Material】Toilet flush handle adopts chrome-plated surface treatment, and the main structure adopts zinc alloy. Strong and reliable, long service life.
【Design】Modern minimalist style, smooth and round without hurting hands. Ideal for toilet handles replacement.
【Practical Household Tools】Toilet cistern flush parts size is 15 cm long,11 cm wide. suitable for standard water tanks (installation hole diameter between 20.5-31mm).
【Easy to Install】Just put the handle into the tank hole, sleeve the spacer and screw on the white plastic, and then screw the white long one to the metal rod of the handle.
【Universal】 The zinc alloy toilet handles flush lever is perfect match for most toilet tanks and toilet lids. Fit for front, side and angled toilet lever mounting to meet your different needs.
description: Product Description Weielt Toilet Flush handle 1. The flush lever kit is perfectly matched with the water tank, easy to install 2. Constructed from premium zinc alloy and chromed metal, this item is corrosion and oxidation resistant, ensuring it is robust and long-lasting, instilling confidence in its use. 3. The toilet cistern parts are suitable for most toilet tanks 4. The chrome plating on the surface not only helps prevent corrosion but also enhances the handle's longevity. Premium Material Toilet Flush Handle Our toilet replacement metal handle is constructed from zinc alloy and chromed metal, ensuring excellent corrosion and oxidation resistance, strength, and durability for long-lasting use. Package Includes: 1x water tank handle 1x fixing nut 1x plastic insulating sleeve 1x water tank lever arm
